signals.headline: XRP Integration Pilot Announced in Japan | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP Integration Pilot Announced in Japan | YES | HIGH confidence**

A **live pilot announcement** revealed a 60% cost savings using XRP versus SWIFT in cross-border payments, announced at the XRP Tokyo event[5]. Additionally, Rakuten's Ruck 10 wallet confirmed XRP integration, providing access to **44 million users** in Japan[4][5].

signals.headline: ETF Inflows Accelerating | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
ETF Inflows Accelerating | YES | HIGH confidence**

XRP is experiencing its **biggest ETF inflow levels in 2 months**, with $11 billion in exchange outflows signaling holders are positioning for upcoming catalysts[1][4].

signals.headline: CLARITY Act Markup Scheduled for Late April | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
CLARITY Act Markup Scheduled for Late April | YES | HIGH confidence**

The Senate returned from recess on April 13th with **CLARITY Act markup targeted for late April**, which would permanently classify XRP as a commodity under federal law[1]. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent has stated the market structure bill must pass this spring, with the Senate calendar and his mandate aligned[1].

Price Action Context**

XRP recently climbed to around $1.39[2], currently sitting at a critical technical level near $1.40 support[3]. Historical April performance shows XRP has averaged **24.8% gains** across its trading history[1].
